name: react-toastify
usage_summary: Used in three files within ui-extensions-dev-console: (1) Toast.tsx renders <ToastContainer> and imports the CSS bundle (react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css); (2) PreviewLink.tsx calls toast() to show a notification; (3) QRCodeModal.tsx calls toast() to confirm URL copy. All usage is within the ui-extensions-dev-console browser app.
how_to_remove: Replace ToastContainer + toast() with a lightweight custom implementation: a React context holding a toast queue (array of {id, message}), a fixed-position container component that renders them with a CSS transition, and a dismiss-after-timeout effect. Alternatively use `sonner` (modern, tiny, framework-agnostic) which has the same imperative toast() API. Changes span 3 source files (~40 LOC total import sites) plus one new context/component.
replacement_reason: react-toastify v9/v10 carries a ~32 kB CSS bundle and ~15 kB JS. The dev-console only uses two toast() call-sites and a single ToastContainer. `sonner` is a smaller, modern alternative with the same imperative API, or the team can inline a ~60-line custom toast context since requirements are minimal (bottom-center, dark theme, no progress bar, close-on-click).
